metadata.title: San Bernardino Free Outreach Clinic - Dr. Brien Hsu
metadata.og:description: On August 14th, 2011, I spent my Sunday morning and afternoon donating my dental services at an outreach clinic for underprivileged families in San Bernardino. In total I saw 18 patients. As a dentist, I always try and salvage a patient’s teeth. So it pains me to see that the majority of my patients seen on […]
